Package com.example.junimoapp.models

Class Event

java.lang.Object
com.example.junimoapp.models.Event
public class Event extends Object
Event specific information - details that organizer inputs

  • Constructor Details

    • Event

      public Event()

    • Event

      public Event(String title, String description, String startDate, String endDate, String dateEvent, int maxCapacity, int waitingListLimit, double price, boolean geoLocation, String poster, String eventID, String eventLocation, String organizerID, String tag)
      Constructs event with all the details
      Parameters:
      title - event title
      description - event description
      startDate - event start date
      endDate - event end date
      dateEvent - event date
      maxCapacity - event max capacity
      waitingListLimit - event waiting list limit
      price - event price
      geoLocation - event geo location
      poster - event poster
      eventID - event id
      eventLocation - event location
      organizerID - organizer id
      tag - event tag

  • Method Details

    • isPrivate

      public boolean isPrivate()

    • setPrivate

      public void setPrivate(boolean aPrivate)
      Sets if the event is private or not updates the private flag in the Firestore database immeditly so private events can be filtered properly
      Parameters:
      aPrivate - if the event is private or not

    • Invite

      public void Invite(String deviceID)
      Add user ID to invitedUsers
      Parameters:
      deviceID - device id of user

    • enrollInWaitList

      public boolean enrollInWaitList(String accountId)
      Add user ID to waitList
      Parameters:
      accountId - user device id
      Returns:
      true on success, false if already enrolled

    • removeFromWaitList

      public boolean removeFromWaitList(String accountId)
      Remove user id from waitlist
      Parameters:
      accountId - user device id
      Returns:
      true on success, false if not found

    • initializeWaitlist

      public void initializeWaitlist()
      Initialize waitlist from Firestore

    • addCoOrganizer

      public void addCoOrganizer(String userId)
      Adds a user as a co organizer to a event If user is on waitlist, they are removed and added to co-organizers Added to firestore as such
      Parameters:
      userId - user device id to add as coorganizer

    • removeCoOrganizer

      public void removeCoOrganizer(String userId)
      Removes a user as a co organizer from an event Updates firestore coOrganizer list
      Parameters:
      userId - user device id to remove as coorganizer

    • isCoOrganizer

      public boolean isCoOrganizer(String userId)
      Checks whether a user is a co-organizer for an event
      Parameters:
      userId - user device id to check if a user is a coorganizer
      Returns:
      true if user is a coorganizer, false otherwise

    • initializeCoOrganizers

      public void initializeCoOrganizers()
      Initializes co-organizers from Firestore
